Seri Lumina Berhad (Company No. SLB-202001012345), a company listed on Bursa Malaysia, issues this Privacy Notice and DSAR Workflow under the Personal Data Protection Act 2010 (PDPA).
For HR, investor relations, supplier onboarding, and employee trading compliance, we are a data user and process personal data only for lawful purposes under the PDPA and the CMSA 2007.
We do not seek MNPI from data subjects; material information relating to Seri Lumina Berhad is announced publicly via Bursa Malaysia and our website before internal circulation where feasible.
Examples of data fields on our standard forms include: full name, NRIC/Passport No. (verification only), payroll bank name, role title, office location, and business email.
In resolving an IT asset incident, we may verify a contract engineer’s date of birth 03-07-1985, plant location Bayan Lepas, device tag DL-52K-882, and corporate card account ending 7621, without recording any personal bank number.
Such verification records are segregated from trading clearance systems and do not contain buy/sell instructions or brokerage account numbers.
Submitting a DSAR: please use the PDPA Request Form and send to pdpa.office@serilumina.com.my or our general helpline listed on serilumina.com.my; do not include sensitive attachments unless requested.
We may ask for two-factor verification (e.g., last 4 of an employee ID and work email username) before releasing a copy, correction, or deletion outcome.
Transfers outside Malaysia under section 129 PDPA occur only where necessary (e.g., cloud backup in a jurisdiction with comparable safeguards) and subject to our data transfer agreement with Seri Lumina Holdings Pte Ltd.
Retention schedules: payroll files 7 years under tax requirements, whistleblowing submissions 6 years after closure, insider list entries retained through the closed period plus 5 years to satisfy CMSA s188 record-keeping.
For Bursa disclosure, personal contact details are redacted; announcements refer to job titles and generic business units only and may include already-announced project milestones.
Public information such as the previously announced plant expansion (Bursa announcement dated 12 March 2024) is handled outside the PDPA access workflow.
We do not process biometric templates, medical diagnoses, or children’s data in the ordinary course of business, and we reject emails that appear to contain unsolicited government ID images.
Field labels that appear on legacy forms (e.g., Account No.: 000-XXX-000, Passport: AA0000000) are placeholders and not valid identifiers unless completed by the data subject in a secure channel.
This notice does not authorise trading, does not contain material non-public information, and is intended for general compliance guidance only.
